    1. ClosePricesCurrencyClose(TreeMap, ReportHelper.CurrencyRequired)

Class ReportHelper.ClosePricesCurrencyClose

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.reports.ReportHelper.ClosePricesCurrencyClose
Enclosing class:
ReportHelper
public static class ReportHelper.ClosePricesCurrencyClose extends Object
Container for loaded price data and associated currency conversion information. Provides a comprehensive data structure for multi-currency price analysis with chronologically ordered price data and optional currency normalization metadata.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    ReportHelper.CurrencyRequired
    currencyRequired
    Currency conversion requirements and configuration for multi-currency analysis.
    final TreeMap<LocalDate, double[]>

    Chronologically ordered map of price data by date.

  • Field Details

    • dateCloseTree

      public final TreeMap<LocalDate, double[]> dateCloseTree
      Chronologically ordered map of price data by date. Each date maps to an array of closing prices for all securities and currency pairs in the analysis. TreeMap ensures proper chronological ordering for time series analysis.

    • currencyRequired

      public ReportHelper.CurrencyRequired currencyRequired
      Currency conversion requirements and configuration for multi-currency analysis. Null when all securities use the same currency and no conversion is needed.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClosePricesCurrencyClose

      public ClosePricesCurrencyClose(TreeMap<LocalDate, double[]> dateCloseTree, ReportHelper.CurrencyRequired currencyRequired)
